tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Fond Of.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Fond Of का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am fond of music. He is fond of reading. She is fond of swimming. We are fond of traveling. They are fond of sweets.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Fond Of.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Fond Of का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Are you fond of dancing? I am fond of photography. He is fond of animals. She is fond of art. We are fond of exploring new places.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उन्हें cricket खेलना पसंद है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They are fond of playing cricket.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "We is fond of traveling."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Fond Of.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Fond Of का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He is fond of cooking. She is fond of gardening. We are fond of watching movies. They are fond of singing.
